caption: A woman with shoulder-length black hair and glasses stands against a plain black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She is wearing a light green top with red and blue floral embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left corner of each scene, there is a circular logo with the text "NPTEL" next to it. Throughout the sequence, she maintains her position while speaking, her mouth opening and closing as she articulates words. Her hands move in a synchronized manner, lifting and shifting slightly to emphasize her speech. Her facial expression remains focused and composed as she looks directly forward. The lighting is consistent across the frames, focusing on the woman and leaving the background in deep shadow.
